UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOLBERT, TANTAY ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 241 SIXTH STREET #607, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TOLBERT, TANTAY DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TOLBERT, TANTAY
